items.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.original_summary: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布声明：美国政府已下达出口管制指令，要求暂停对 Claude Fable 5 与 Claude Mythos 5 的全部访问。这是区域性合规与可用性事件，直接影响调用对应模型的应用。这是模型层级的强制下线，而非 deprecation 周期，调用方会立即收到不可用错误。
items.backend_focus: 紧急：立即在代码库中排查 model 字段是否出现 claude-fable-5 / claude-mythos-5（以及 InfoQ 报道中提到的 Fable 5 别名），将所有相关调用降级或回退到 Claude Opus 4.8 / Claude Sonnet 4 系列；为相关调用路径添加 try/catch 与降级策略，避免上游不可用导致线上故障。

items.title: Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the be
items.original_summary: nefits of AI to communities across America. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries. Product  Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger perform...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 宣布启动 Claude Corps——面向职业早期人群的美国全国性 AI fellowship 项目，旨在把 AI 红利带到各地社区。同页还挂出了 Project Glasswing 扩展、Claude Opus 4.8 发布及 AI 政策提案等链接。这是人才/政策类品牌动作。
items.backend_focus: 营销大于实质，无需行动。本次为 fellowship 项目公告，不涉及 API/SDK/模型更新，工程团队无需跟进。

items.title: Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries.
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements   Product  Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of m...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 宣布将 Project Glasswing 扩展到约 150 个新组织、覆盖 15 个以上国家。这是企业试点项目扩容，不涉及新模型、新 API、新 SDK，也没有定价或限流调整。属于商务/生态层面动作。
items.backend_focus: 营销大于实质，无需行动。本次为企业试点项目扩展公告，不影响公开 API、SDK 或模型可用性，工程团队无需跟进。

items.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consi
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approx...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布 Claude Opus 4.8，Opus 系列模型升级，编码、agentic 任务与专业工作负载表现更强，并显著降低相关成本（按上下文信息推断）。这是 Opus 主线版本号跃迁（4.5 → 4.8），调用方可通过 model 字段指定新版本，旧 Opus 4.5 调用仍兼容但官方可能随后推动迁移。
items.backend_focus: 升级方式：Chat Completions / Messages API 的 model 字段从 claude-opus-4-5 切换到 claude-opus-4-8，对编码和 agent 场景做 A/B 评估；建议在内部 routing 逻辑中为高复杂度任务优先分配 Opus 4.8，并关注 Anthropic 后续 deprecation 时间线以便把 4.5 替换下来。

We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approx...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 联合创始人 Chris Olah 就教皇 Leo XIV 的通谕《Magnifica humanitas》发表致辞，内容是关于 AI 与人类关系的公开声明。这属于品牌/公共事务内容，与工程完全无关。

items.title: Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 在首尔开设办公室，并宣布与韩国 AI 生态的多家新合作伙伴达成合作。这是区域市场拓展公告，不涉及新模型、新 API、新 SDK，也没有定价或限流变化。属于商务/品牌层面动作。
items.backend_focus: 营销大于实质，无需行动。本次为办公室开业与区域合作公告，不影响 API/SDK 行为，韩国区域可用性变化需等待官方进一步披露，工程团队暂时无需跟进。

items.title: Results from the first Anthropic Public Record
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布首份「Public Record」结果，公开其内部政策、部署与安全实践相关数据。这是透明度报告类内容，不涉及模型、API、SDK、定价或限流变化。属于公共事务/合规披露。
items.backend_focus: 营销大于实质，无需行动。本次为透明度报告发布，不涉及任何 API/SDK/模型变更，工程团队无需跟进；如团队在做合规审计可作为参考材料。

items.title: TCS and Anthropic partner to bring Claude to regulated industries
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 与 TCS 达成合作，把 Claude 引入受监管行业（金融、医疗等）。这是企业合作公告，不涉及新模型、新 API、新 SDK，也没有定价或限流调整。属于商务/渠道层面动作。
items.backend_focus: 营销大于实质，无需行动。本次为合作公告，不影响公开 API、SDK 或模型可用性，工程团队无需跟进。

items.title: DXC will integrate Claude into the systems banks, airlines, and other regulated industries rely on
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 与 DXC 达成联盟，DXC 将把 Claude 集成进银行、航空等受监管行业所依赖的核心系统。这是企业合作公告，不涉及新模型、新 API、新 SDK，也没有定价或限流变化。属于商务/渠道层面动作。
items.backend_focus: 营销大于实质，无需行动。本次为联盟合作公告，不影响公开 API、SDK 或模型可用性，工程团队无需跟进。
